Need help with a question? Type 'help' or select a topic:
Please position the card precisely within the frame
Scan your electronic health insurance card (eGK) to automatically read your name, date of birth, and insurance details. Simply hold the card in front of the camera.
You can prepare appointments via "Appointment / Anamnesis". The anamnesis takes approximately 5-8 minutes. Afterwards, your request will be assigned to the practice.
With the camera function you can scan your electronic health card (eGK). Name, date of birth, and insurance number are read automatically.

Private services (IGeL) are billed according to GOÄ (fee schedule for physicians). Statutory health insurance services are billed directly via your insurance card. You will be informed of any costs before treatment.
Your data will be automatically deleted 24 hours after session completion. You can also request immediate deletion at any time per GDPR Art. 17 (right to erasure).
Under "Documents / Findings" you can upload external findings, lab results, or other documents. PDF, JPG, and PNG up to 10 MB are allowed.
Select your concern on the home page. The assistant will guide you step by step. If you have problems, you can press "Back" at any time or get help here in the chat.
We accept statutory (GKV) and private (PKV) insured patients as well as self-payers. Please have your insurance card ready.

You can request follow-up prescriptions via "Medications / Prescriptions". Please provide the active ingredient, dosage, and package size. E-prescriptions are available when the insurance card has been read this quarter.
Information about parking and accessibility can be found on our website or ask at reception. We are easily accessible by public transport.
Repeat prescriptions can be requested via 'Medications / Prescriptions'. Processing usually takes 24 hours. E-prescriptions are possible when the insurance card has been read this quarter.
Your data is encrypted with AES-256 during transmission and storage. Processing is GDPR-compliant and exclusively for medical purposes.
You can request referrals via "Referral". Please specify the desired specialty and reason.
Lab results and reports are usually available within 2-3 business days. You can view them digitally in the app or request them at the reception.
You can request a sick leave certificate via "Sick Leave (AU)". Describe your symptoms and how long you have had them.
Please bring your vaccination record to your appointment. We offer all standard vaccinations recommended by STIKO. Flu vaccinations are available seasonally.
You can check your current position in the waiting room at any time in the app. Average waiting time depends on the urgency of patients – emergency cases are always prioritized.
You can communicate directly with our practice team here. If you have questions or need help, simply send us a message.
You will now be redirected to the secure payment provider.
AES-256 encrypted • GDPR-compliant • Exclusively for medical use

Yes. All patient data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM. The system includes a three-stage consent dialog per GDPR Art. 6 and Art. 9, a complete audit trail, role-based access control and automatic deletion after 24 hours.

The system contains 10 clinical triage rules – 4 of which are CRITICAL. For symptom combinations like chest pain + shortness of breath, the team is alerted in under 2 seconds. Medical assessment always remains with the doctor.
How does the app detect emergencies?
No. DiggAI complements your PMS. The collected data can be exported as PDF, CSV or JSON and imported into your existing system.
Does DiggAI replace my practice management system?
Three options: (1) Provide a practice tablet with QR code, (2) A companion fills it out on their own device, (3) MFA-assisted mode – the MFA conducts the interview and enters the data digitally.
What happens if a patient doesn't have a smartphone?
Immediately. DiggAI runs as a web app in the browser – no installation, no hardware. Demo mode is available without login.
How quickly can we get started?
270+ medical questions in 10 structured service flows. Intelligent routing shows only relevant questions – patients save up to 40% of filling time.
10 Services: Appointment, prescriptions, sick leave, BG accident, referral, etc.
Intelligent routing by age, gender, symptoms
Bidirectional chat between patient and practice team. Integrated FAQ bot answers common questions automatically.
Role-based dashboards with live statistics, AI summaries, PDF/CSV export and real-time waiting room management.
AES-256-GCM encryption for all patient data. Three-stage GDPR consent, audit trail and automatic deletion after 24 hours.
10 clinical triage rules check every answer in real time. For critical symptom constellations, the practice team is alerted in under 2 seconds.
4 CRITICAL alerts: ACS, suicidality, SAH, syncope
Immediate notification in the doctor dashboard
Digital patient intake for medical practices – multilingual, AI-powered, GDPR-compliant. Everything you need to know about DiggAI.

I consent that the practice may process my personal data provided in the questionnaire (name, date of birth, contact details, insurance status) for the purpose of treatment planning and appointment preparation.
I expressly consent pursuant to Art. 9(2)(a) GDPR to the processing of my health data (pre-existing conditions, medications, symptoms, allergies). This data is used exclusively for medical care.

I am aware that I can revoke this consent at any time without giving reasons. A revocation does not affect the lawfulness of the processing carried out up to that point. I can contact the practice at any time to have my data deleted.
In order to provide you with the best possible care, we collect and process personal and medical data within this digital medical history form. Please read the following information carefully.
Click the language icon at the top right to switch between German, English, Turkish, Arabic, Ukrainian and Spanish. The interface switches immediately.
Via the sun/moon icon, switch between light and dark mode. The setting is saved.
Use the font size controls to adjust text size between 90% and 150%. Ideal for elderly patients or those with visual impairments.
Activate kiosk mode for waiting room tablets. The mode optimizes the display for touch operation and prevents accidental exit from the app.
The admin dashboard at /admin offers 7 tabs: Overview, Patient Flow, Security, Export, Productivity, Architecture and Changelog. Live metrics show current practice operations.
Monitor audit trail, encryption status and access rights. All actions are logged with timestamp, user ID and IP address.
Export aggregated reports on practice utilization, language distribution and triage statistics. Available as PDF, CSV or JSON.
Navigate to /arzt and log in. You'll immediately see all patient sessions assigned to you with live status.
Click on a session to open the AI-powered summary. Answers are clinically sorted: Personal data → Concern → Medical history → Pre-existing conditions.
Tip: Triage flags are color-highlighted. Red flags require immediate attention.
For critical symptom constellations, a real-time alert appears. Acknowledge the alert with one click to document that you have taken note of it.
Via the integrated real-time chat, you can ask follow-up questions to the patient before they enter the consultation room.
Export anamnesis data as PDF with practice header, as CSV (compatible with Excel and PMS) or as JSON for technical integrations.
Open the app and navigate to /mfa. Log in with your credentials. The dashboard shows all incoming patient sessions.
Create QR codes for the waiting room. Patients scan the code and start the anamnesis on their own smartphone.
Tip: Print QR codes and place them in the waiting room, at the reception and in the treatment rooms.
Assign incoming sessions to the responsible doctor. The system automatically suggests the appropriate doctor based on the specialty.
The real-time waiting room shows all patients with status (waiting, called, in treatment). Call patients and start treatment with one click.
Enter your name, date of birth, gender and insurance data. Existing patients can skip these fields.
Answer the questions step by step. You can switch language at any time, adjust the font size or activate dark mode.
Tip: For medical terms, you'll find explanations via the info icon (ℹ️).
Select the affected body region from 13 options. The system automatically activates the appropriate specialty-specific questions (e.g., cardiology, neurology).
At the end, you see a structured summary of all information. Review everything and send the data encrypted to the practice team.
All patient data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM – the same standard used by banks. Encryption happens already on your device (client-side encryption).
Incomplete sessions are automatically deleted after 24 hours. Completed sessions can be exported by the doctor and then manually deleted.
You have the right to access, rectification and deletion of your data at any time per GDPR. Consent can be withdrawn at any time.
The most comprehensive service: 270+ medical questions with intelligent routing. Based on your answers, only relevant follow-up questions are asked. Coverage: 13 medical specialties.
Request repeat prescriptions for your regular medication. Enter your current medications – by typing or camera scan of your medication plan.
Request a sick leave certificate. Describe your symptoms and when they started.
Document work, commuting or school accidents in a structured format. All relevant fields for BG reporting are covered.
Referral, appointment cancellation, document/results upload, phone request, document request and general messages to the practice team.
Scan the QR code in the waiting room with your smartphone camera or open the link given to you by the MFA. The app runs directly in the browser – no installation needed.
Tip: You can also save the app as a PWA on your home screen for faster access.
Scan QR code or open link
On first access, a privacy dialog appears. Read the information and confirm consent per GDPR Art. 6 and Art. 9. Without consent, no data can be collected.
On the homepage you see 10 service tiles. Select the appropriate concern: Anamnesis, prescription request, sick leave, BG accident report, referral and more.
Tip: The estimated duration is shown on each tile. A complete anamnesis takes only 5–8 minutes.
Step-by-step guide for all user roles: Patient, MFA, Doctor and Administrator. With tips and best practices.
